calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Concerning Determining To Whom Property, And Accrued Income Thereon, Shall
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. DEB L. KINNEY FOR JACK BIRD, TRUSTEE

THE COURT RAISED SOME CONCERNS REGARDING THE ISSUE RAISED IN THE EXAMINER'S NOTE THAT SECTION 16345(D) APPLIES TO AN INCOME BENEFICIARY'S INTEREST AND DOES NOT APPLY HERE. THE COURT USED OPTION 2 AND STRUCK OPTION 3 IN THE PROPOSED ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lee.
